overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character exploring a snowy mountain campsite at dusk. The character exits a wooden shelter and walks through deep snow past canvas tents and campfires before crouching down to rest by a fire.

events.description: character exits wooden doorway into open snowfield
campsite with tents and fire becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking away from the shelter toward distant campfires and tents

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame of the shelter being exited
jagged mountain peaks covered in snow against the sky
dense snow-covered evergreen trees surrounding the clearing
distant burning campfire with orange flames visible
dark canvas tent partially obscured by trees

segments.scene_description: The character exits a wooden shelter into a wide snowy mountain clearing at dusk. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while a dense pine forest surrounds the area. A distant campfire and canvas tent become visible as the character walks forward through the deep snow.

events.description: turning left to navigate between campsite tents
passing close to burning campfire with visible flames

agents.ego_description: walking through the campsite navigating between tents and supply piles

entered.detail: smaller canvas tent on the right side of the camp
scattered wooden crates and supplies in the snow

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the campsite proper, walking between canvas tents. The sky becomes partially obscured by dense pine branches overhead. The character passes supply piles and navigates around the tents while approaching a central campfire area.

scene_state.functional_zone: campfire resting spot with lean-to shelter

events.description: slowing down and stopping at the campfire location
character crouches down to sit by the campfire

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire and crouching down to rest by the flames

entered.detail: wooden lean-to shelter with stacked logs and canvas covering
wooden crates and bedrolls stacked near the shelter

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main campfire and lean-to shelter at the heart of the camp. The fire provides warm orange light against the blue dusk surroundings. The character slows down and crouches by the fire to rest, with the wooden shelter and supply crates visible nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a wooden shelter out into a snowy mountain campsite as dusk settles over the landscape. It begins as the character steps out into a wide clearing, moving through deep snow toward distant canvas tents and snow-capped peaks framed by a dense pine forest. As the character enters the heart of the camp, the open sky is gradually obscured by overhanging pine branches while the camera navigates past supply piles and canvas shelters. The scene then shifts toward a central campfire and lean-to, where the cool blue tones of the evening are replaced by a warm orange glow. Finally, the camera slows as the character crouches by the fire to rest, with the surrounding crates and wooden structures fading into the dim light.
